violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to washed and sanitized. Ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. An asterisk is needed on the items that are offered undercooked or raw. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
ROP salmon was observed thawed in cooler with package still intact. PIC informed and voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The door to the outside, located in the (back storage area ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
